zh.Broadbotham, Mottram, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾莫特拉姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Woley於1355年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Rafe de Woley47歲，母親Mrs. Rafe de Woley35歲。他於1394年與Agnes Woolley在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Broadbotham, Mottram, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾莫特拉姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Woley于1355年出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Rafe de Woley47岁，母亲Mrs. Rafe de Woley35岁。他于1394年与Agnes Woolley在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年之后在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Woley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Boleslaw, Halina, Janusz, Krzysztof, Lech, Stanislaw.
Polish: from a pet form of a personal name such as Wolimir (see Wolak ).
Polish (Wołek): nickname from wołek ‘little bullock’, or possibly a metonymic occupational name for someone who looked after bullocks.

variants.name: Wolak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Ludwik, Andrzej, Casimir, Genowefa, Janusz, Jaroslaw, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Piotr, Teofil.
Polish: patronymic from a short form of a personal name, such as Wolimir, based on the Slavic element vol ‘to want’ (from Old Slavic voliti, Polish woleć).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Woley was born in 1355, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Rafe de Woley, was 47 and his mother, Mrs. Rafe de Woley, was 35. He married Agnes Woolley in 1394, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1410, in his hometown, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Woley est né en 1355, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rafe de Woley, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Rafe de Woley, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Woolley en 1394, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1410, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Woley 1355 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rafe de Woley 47 und seine Mutter Mrs. Rafe de Woley 35. Er hat 1394 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Woolley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1410 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Woley è nato il nel 1355 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Rafe de Woley, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Rafe de Woley, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Woolley nel 1394, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1410, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Woley, Hollingsworth, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Woleyが1355年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rafe de Woleyは47歳，母Mrs. Rafe de Woleyは35歳であった。1394年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAgnes Woolleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Woley(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rafe de Woley(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Rafe de Woley(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Agnes Woolley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Broadbotham, Mottram, Cheshire, England: Mottram, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Woley nasceu em 1355, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rafe de Woley, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Rafe de Woley, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Woolley em 1394, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1410, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Woley родился в 1355 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rafe de Woley было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Rafe de Woley, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Woolley в 1394 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1410 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Woley nació en 1355, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Rafe de Woley, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mrs. Rafe de Woley, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Agnes Woolley en 1394, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1410, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
